_comment: AcreOS MCP Server — Claude Desktop configuration
_instructions: Add the 'acreos' entry under 'mcpServers' in your Claude Desktop config:
Option A — stdio (run locally against a local AcreOS dev instance):
Requires DATABASE_URL env var pointing at your Postgres database.
Option B — HTTP (connect to deployed AcreOS at acreos.fly.dev):
Use the 'url' transport pointing at the /mcp endpoint.
(HTTP MCP support requires Claude Desktop >= 0.10 or a compatible host)

acreos-stdio._comment: Option A: local stdio transport (runs server/mcp/index.ts as a subprocess)

acreos-http._comment: Option B: HTTP StreamableHTTP transport (connect to deployed app)
